title: EATP Audit Anchor
description: Immutable record of an agent action in the audit trail.

resource.description: Resource the action was performed on

trust_chain_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the trust chain at time of action

parent_anchor_id.description: ID of parent audit anchor (for causal chains)

reasoning_trace.description: Optional structured rationale for this audited action

reasoning_trace_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the JCS (RFC 8785)-canonicalized reasoning trace, formatted as 'sha256:<hex-digest>' (lowercase, 64 chars). Always included in the signing payload: the hash value when a reasoning trace is present, null when absent.

reasoning_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical reasoning trace, signed by the entity creating the audit anchor
